TEXT.TRY_ANOTHER_EMAIL: If this email address is already in use, try another.
TEXT.PIN_TO_ACCESS_DATA: This pin is required to access all your data.
TEXT.PASSKEY_DOWNLOADED: A file named passkey.txt has been downloaded to your device. This file contains a recovery key required to reset your password in the future. Store it securely and do not delete or share it.
TEXT.DO_NOT_LOSE_PASSKEY: If you lose this file, you won't be able to reset your password by any method.
TEXT.PASSKEY_INFO: This Passkey is required to Reset your Password.
TEXT.GENERATE_NEW_PASSKEY: You can generate a new Passkey but only the latest one will be valid.
TEXT.NO_PAGE_EXIST: The page you are looking for doesn't exist.
TEXT.FAILED_TO_LOAD_VAULTS: Failed to load your Vaults. Please check your internet connection and try again.
TEXT.TRANSLATION_DESCLAIMER: Translations are provided for reading convenience only. In case of any translation inconsistencies, English shall prevail.
TEXT.VIEW_AND_LOGOUT_SESSIONS: View the devices where your account is currently logged in. You can logout from any device by terminating the session.
TEXT.PLEASE_WAIT_LOADING: This may take a while, please do not refresh the page.
TEXT.CONFIRM_LOGOUT: This will Logout from this device, do you want to proceed ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_LOGOUT_ALL: This will Logout from all other devices except this, do you want to proceed ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_REGENERATE: Do you want to proceed with generating a new Passkey ?
TEXT.PIN_REQUIRED: You need to enter your 6-digit security pin to access this data.
TEXT.PASSWORD_NEEDED_TO_SAVE_SETTINGS: You need to enter your password to save changes.
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_PASSWORD: A password once deleted cannot be recovered. Do you want to proceed ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_REMOVE: Removing this label will not delete it permanently and it can be recovered.
TEXT.CONFIRM_RECOVER: Recovering this label will make all the passwords under it accessible again.
TEXT.BANK_ACCOUNT_DISCLAIMER: These account details are only used for virtual account management inside Aegis and are not connected to your real bank account in any way.
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_ACCOUNT: Deleting this account will delete all its realted expenses, incomes and investments, do you want to continue ?
TEXT.COMFIRM_DELETE_INCOME: This income will not be deleted if there are expenses under it. Do you want to continue ?
TEXT.EXCEL_UPLOAD_INFO: Upload the excel in this format
TEXT.ASSIGN_CATEGORIES: Assign categories to all the expenses
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_EXPENSE: Are you sure you want to delete this expense ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_FD: Are you sure you want to delete this Fixed Deposit ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_RD: Are you sure you want to delete this Recurring Deposit ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_GOLD: Do you want to delete this gold asset record ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_STOCK: Are you sure you want to delete this stock record?
TEXT.ZOOM_AT_90_NOTE: Keep screen zoom at 90% for the best view.
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_TASK: Are you sure you want to delete this task ?
TEXT.COMFIRM_MARK_COMPLETE: This action cannot be undone, do you want to proceed ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to delete this journal ?
TEXT.CONFIRM_DELETE_NOTE: Are you sure you want to delete this note ?
TEXT.HERO_SECTION_SUBTITLE: One place for everything that matters.
TEXT.DONT_HIT_BACK: Closing the tab or hitting back will exit you from the process.
TEXT.ENTER_PASSKEY: Copy your latest Pass Key and paste here.
TEXT.DONT_REFRESH: Do not refresh the page or close the tab.
TEXT.ENTER_NEW_PIN: Set new Security Pin for your vaults.
TEXT.STOP_MANAGING_ACROSS_MULTIPLE_APPS: Stop managing your data across multiple apps. Get everything locked in a single encrypted vault. Access from anywhere you want.
TEXT.FEATURED_VAULTS_SUBTITLE: Purpose-built vaults for things that you actually manage day to day.
TEXT.PASSWORD_MANAGER_DESC: Store, categorise, manage and autofill every credential with end-to-end encryption.
TEXT.EXPENSE_MANAGER_DESC: Track spending and budgets under various incomes added across multiple bank accounts.
TEXT.INVESTMENT_MANAGER_DESC: Keep a private ledger of bank deposits, holdings and values — visible only to you.
TEXT.PLANNING_MANAGER_DESC: Notes, tasks and schedules, sealed inside the same vault as everything else.
TEXT.ZERO_KNOWLEDGE_SUBTITLE: Every row of data is encrypted before it ever leaves your device. Nobody can read your data, only you hold the key.
TEXT.DAY_WITH_AEGIS_SUBTITLE: From the first schedule check to the last journal entry, its with you.
TEXT.BROWSER_EXTENSION_SUBTITLE: Secure browser extension support for Password Manager that autofills your stored passwords.
TEXT.HOW_IT_WORKS_SUBTITLE: From zero to secure in four steps.
TEXT.CREATE_ACCOUNT_DESC: Set up Aegis in under a minute — no personal data required to start.
TEXT.CHOOSE_VAULT_DESC: Pick from passwords, expenses, investments or planning — or use them all.
TEXT.SAVE_DATA_DESC: Add anything you want protected. Access from any device by your login.
TEXT.ENCRYPTED_FOREVER_DESC: Your key, your access. Not even Aegis can read what you store.
TEXT.FAQ_A1: It means your data is encrypted and decrypted only on your device. Aegis stores encrypted data and can never decrypt and read it. All the encryptions and decryptions are dependent on your security pin.
TEXT.FAQ_Q2: What happens if I lose my account password?
TEXT.FAQ_A2: You can reset your account password using your 6 digit security pin and the Pass Key which is downloaded during account creation. If any one of them is missing, there is no way to recover your account.
TEXT.FAQ_Q3: Can I use Aegis across multiple devices?
TEXT.FAQ_A3: Yes. Your encrypted vault syncs across devices. Decryption still only happens locally, on whichever device you are using.
TEXT.FAQ_Q4: Is the browser extension safe to use?
TEXT.FAQ_A4: The extension uses the same account and is also protected by the same security pin as that of your Password Manager. It only decrypts data locally when you choose to autofill. Nothing is ever sent anywhere unencrypted.
TEXT.FAQ_Q5: Can I change my 6 digit security pin?
TEXT.FAQ_A5: Yes. As long as you remember your account password, you can reset your security pin and get access to your vaults.
TEXT.FOOTER_TAGLINE: Its the encrypted vault for everything you don't want anyone else to see.

INCOME_SORT_OPTIONS.AMOUNT_ASC: Sort by Amount Low to High
INCOME_SORT_OPTIONS.AMOUNT_DESC: Sort by Amount High to Low

HELP_TEXT.TITLE: Title
HELP_TEXT.CLICK_PLUS_OPEN_POPUP: Click the Plus Button to open popup
HELP_TEXT.CLICK_BUTTON_OPEN_POPUP: Click the button to open Popup
HELP_TEXT.SECURELY_STORE_MANAGE_PASSWORDS: Securely Store and Manager your important Passwords.
HELP_TEXT.PASSWORD_ADDITION_SUBTITLE: Enter platform name, username and password, select category then click Add Password button to add password.
HELP_TEXT.USE_DROPDOWN_SWITCH_LABEL: Use the dropdown to switch Labels
HELP_TEXT.ACCESSING_PASSWORDS_SUBTITLE: All Passwords added under the selected Label will be displayed.
HELP_TEXT.CREATING_LABEL_SUBTITLE: Enter Label name and click Create button. This Lable will now be available in dropdowns.
HELP_TEXT.REMOVE_LABEL_TITLE: Click the X button to remove a Label
HELP_TEXT.REMOVE_LABEL_SUBTITLE: Removed Labels cannot be selected from the dropdown. Passwords present under removed labels will not be deleted. Other is a default Label and cannot be removed.
HELP_TEXT.RECOVER_LABEL_TITLE: Click the button to recover removed Label
HELP_TEXT.RECOVER_LABEL_SUBTITLE: On recovering a Label, it will be displayed in the dropdown again and the passwords present under it will become accessible again.
HELP_TEXT.HIDE_REMOVED_LABELS_TITLE: Enable the Hide Removed Labels settings
HELP_TEXT.HIDE_REMOVED_LABELS_SUBTITLE: This will hide the Removed Labels section and the removed Labels will not be deleted.
HELP_TEXT.EXTESION_USE_SUBTITLE: Download the browser extension and enable on your browser. Login using your same account use the same security pin to access your passwords. The security pin is required everytime you access the extension.
HELP_TEXT.PASSWORD_ACCESS_SUBTITLE: Through this extension, you can only access and autofill the passwords that are already added from Password Manager. You cannot add new password from it. For best experience of the extension, store the site name directly as shown in the url of login page while adding the password for a site.
HELP_TEXT.TRACK_EXPENSES_IN_SMARTER_WAY: A Smarter way to track your Expenses.
HELP_TEXT.SWITCH_ACCOUNT_SUBTITLE: Click the Switch button to change Bank Account. Atleast 1 account is required to use Expense Manager.
HELP_TEXT.MANAGE_ACCOUNTS_SUBTITLE: Select, Delete or Add new bank account. Deleting a bank account will delete all incomes, expenses and investments under it.
HELP_TEXT.ADD_INCOME_SUBTITLE: Enter income source and amount in the Popup. This income amount will be added to selected account and cannot be edited.
HELP_TEXT.DELETE_INCOME_SUBTITLE: You can completely delete an income from an account only if there are no expenses added under it.
HELP_TEXT.ACTIVE_INCOME_TITLE: Use these dropdowns to switch Income
HELP_TEXT.ACTIVE_INCOME_SUBTITLE: Expenses, Budget limits and Analytics are all based on selected Income. Only the expenses present under selected Income will be displayed in Expense tab.
HELP_TEXT.ADD_EXPENSES: Enter all details and choose category to add the expense. Expenses will always be added under selected income.
HELP_TEXT.DELETE_AND_CATEGORIZE_EXPENSES: An added expense cannot be edited but can be deleted. You can also display the expenses in groups as per their Categories.
HELP_TEXT.VIEW_CATEGORIES: Go to Categories tab to view all your Categories.
HELP_TEXT.CATEGORIES_DETAILS_L2: You can create a new Category from here by entering the category name and icon.
HELP_TEXT.CATEGORIES_DETAILS_L3: A Category once created cannot be deleted or edited.
HELP_TEXT.CATEGORIES_DETAILS_L4: Your Categories will stay same across all your bank accounts.
HELP_TEXT.SET_BUDGET_TITLE: Go to Categories tab and click Set Budget button
HELP_TEXT.SET_BUDGET_SUBTITLE: The Popup opens to set budget for the selected Income. You can set different budget (spending limit) for each category. Different budget can be set for each Income. You expenses against the set limit can be tracked here.
HELP_TEXT.ANALYTICS_SUBTITLE: View a detailed analysis of all your expenses under the selected Income.
HELP_TEXT.TRANSFER_EXPENSES_TITLE: You can move your expenses from one Income to another
HELP_TEXT.TRANSFER_EXPENSES_SUBTITLE: Click the button to open the Transfer Expense menu. Expenses under selected Income will be listed here. Select the target Income and select the expenses to move then click Transfer Expense button. This feature allows efficient future planning.
HELP_TEXT.OPEN_QUICKSAVE: Click this button on Home page to open Quicksave. You can add the home screen shortcut for accessing Quicksave. It can be accessed without internet. The expenses added under Quicksave are specific to device and not to user account.
HELP_TEXT.IMPORT_FROM_QUICKSAVE: These expenses can be directly imported in Expense Manager and will be added under the selected Income. The import process will require internet connection.
HELP_TEXT.TRACK_INVESTMENT_HISTORY: Track your asset details with their history
HELP_TEXT.SAME_BANK_ACCOUNT: You can use same bank account in Expense Manager and Investment Manager. However, the amount present in Investments will not be shown in account balance.
HELP_TEXT.SWITCHING_INVESTMENTS_TYPES: Use the dropdowns to switch between FD, RD and Gold Assets, Stocks. FD and RD are present in Deposits tab while Gold Assets and Stocks can be viewed in Holdings tab.
HELP_TEXT.ADDING_INVESTMENT_BUTTONS: Use the + button to open Popup for adding deposits. Click the second button to open Popup for adding Holdings.
HELP_TEXT.CREATING_FD_SUBTITLE: Enter the principal amount, rate of interest (in p.c.p.a.), period of FD in days and other fields while adding FD. The maturity amount and date is automatically calculated. Please note that the maturity amount is calculated based on Quarterly Compounding and sometimes may differ from the actual maturity amount provided by bank by small proportions. These numbers are provided by precise record keeping purpose only.
HELP_TEXT.DELETING_FD_SUBTITLE: Click the View button to display FD details. You can completely delete the FD record along with its history from here.
HELP_TEXT.ROLLING_MATURED_FD_SUBTITLE: You can rollover an FD only after its maturity. Enter the maturity amount (previous principal + interest) as principal, new rate and period in days and Click Rollover button. This helps to maintian the record of rolled FDs.
HELP_TEXT.ROLLED_FD_SUBTITLE: You can see the entire history of rollovers and interests provided for the FD.
HELP_TEXT.CLOSING_FD_SUBTITLE: An FD can be marked as closed from the FD details Popup. You can mark an FD closed when you totally close the FD withdrawing its complete maturity amount. If you withdraw the interest and renew the FD at same principal, you should not mark it closed here. Instead, Rollover the FD by entering same principal amount. Please note the breakup amount will be different in case the FD is closed prematurity.
HELP_TEXT.CLOSED_FD_SHOWN_IN_ANALYTICS: The total interest earned on closed FDs is shown in Analytics Dashborad in the ROI widget. Please note that if an FD is closed before maturity, its interest is not considered here.
HELP_TEXT.CREATING_RD_SUBTITLE: Enter the monthly installment amount, rate of interest (in p.c.p.a.), period of RD in months and other fields while adding RD. The maturity amount and date is automatically calculated. Please note that the maturity amount is calculated based on Quarterly Compounding and sometimes may differ from the actual maturity amount provided by bank by small proportions. Also the maturity date is calculated based on the start date, sometimes bank may provide diffrent maturity dates based on their policies. These numbers are provided by precise record keeping purpose only.
HELP_TEXT.DELETING_RD_SUBTITLE: Click the View button to display RD details. The installment records upto current month will be automatically generated here. You can also delete an RD entry.
HELP_TEXT.CLOSING_RD_SUBTITLE: An RD can be marked as closed from the RD details Popup. You can mark an RD closed when you actually withdraw the maturity amount after its maturity. You can also mark it closed if you break the RD before maturity but please note that the actual breakup amount will differ in this case.
HELP_TEXT.CLOSED_RD_SHOWN_IN_ANALYTICS: The total interest earned on closed RDs is shown in Analytics Dashborad in the ROI widget. Please note that if an RD is closed before maturity, its interest is not considered here.
HELP_TEXT.ADDING_GOLD_SUBTITLE: Enter the weight (in grams), rate (price per gram), total price and other fields while adding Gold assets records. 4 Gold types are supported for tracking separation of assets. While adding digital gold, you can also enter the broker name.
HELP_TEXT.DELETING_GOLD_SUBTITLE: Click the View button to display Gold Asset details. You can delete the asset records from here. Please note that the live prices of gold are not displayed anywhere here.
HELP_TEXT.SELLING_GOLD_SUBTITLE: Gold Assets can be marked as sold from the Gold Asset details Popup. While marking it as sold, you need to enter the selling date and actual amount for which it was sold. This amount is used to calculate the profits earned on it.
HELP_TEXT.SOLD_GOLD_SHOWN_IN_ANALYTICS: The total profits or loss accounted by sold Gold Assets is shown in Analytics Dashborad in the ROI widget.
HELP_TEXT.ADDING_STOCKS_SUBTITLE: Enter the number of units, unit price, total price, exchange and other fields while adding Stocks records. Please ensure that you enter all prices in the currency of you selected bank account.
HELP_TEXT.DELETING_STOCKS_SUBTITLE: Click the View button to display Stock details. You can delete the Stock records from here. Please note that the live prices of stocks are not displayed anywhere here.
HELP_TEXT.SELLING_STOCKS_SUBTITLE: Stocks can be marked as sold from the Stock details Popup. While marking it as sold, you need to enter the selling date and actual amount for which it was sold. This amount is used to calculate the profits earned on it.
HELP_TEXT.SOLD_STOCKS_SHOWN_IN_ANALYTICS: The total profits or loss accounted by sold Stocks is shown in Analytics Dashborad in the ROI widget.
HELP_TEXT.PLANNER_TAGLINE: Your Calendar, your Day, your Notes
HELP_TEXT.COLLECTION_DETAILS_SUBTITLE: Collections are special structured lists that store specific details. You can view the entries in any collection by clicking on it.
HELP_TEXT.EDITING_COLLECTION_ENTRIES: Click the edit button to add, remove or update entries present in the collection.
HELP_TEXT.COLLECTION_SETTINGS_TITLE: Turn on the settings to disable Collection modifications
HELP_TEXT.COLLECTION_SETTINGS_SUBTITLE: This will prevent the specific Collection from being edited or deleted. However, you can read the entries present in them even if the disable modification settings is turned on.
HELP_TEXT.ADD_WEEKLY_SCHEDULE: Click the button to open Schedule Management Popup. You can set the weekly schedule by adding items here.
HELP_TEXT.VIEW_SCHEDULE_IN_CALENDAR: Select specific date in Calendar to show the schedule items and tasks for that day. The schedule items added for a specific weekday will be repeated in Calendar on that day for all the weeks.
HELP_TEXT.ADDING_TASK_IN_CALENDAR: Click the + button to open Event Creation Popup. Add the task details with its start time, end time and date. These tasks will be displayed in Calendar along with the schedule items on that specific date only.
HELP_TEXT.COMPLETING_TASKS: Click the task in Calendar to view task details. You can mark the task complete or delete it entirely from the Calendar.
HELP_TEXT.CALENDAR_SETTINGS_TITLE: Use the Calendar settings to change the view
HELP_TEXT.CALENDAR_SETTINGS_SUBTITLE: You can hide the schedule items entirely, hide completed tasks or high priority tasks and change the clock format of the Calendar.
HELP_TEXT.ADD_JOURNAL_SUBTITLE: Click the + button to open the Popup and switch to Journal tab. Select the journal date and write the story of the day.
HELP_TEXT.ACCESSING_JOURNALS: You can read your journal by selecting the specific date from the calendar and clicking on the Journal card. Also all the journals are also displayed together in the Notes tab.
HELP_TEXT.EDITING_JOURNAL_SUBTITLE: Click the edit button on the Journal card to modify or delete the journal. You cannot change the date once a journal is written.
HELP_TEXT.DISABLE_JOURNAL_MODIFICATIONS_SETTINGS: Turn on the settings to disable journal modifications. This will allow reading of the journal but will prevent it from being edited or deleted.
HELP_TEXT.ADD_NOTES_SUBTITLE: Click the button to open the note creation Popup. Enter the title, priority and tag and write the note.
HELP_TEXT.ACCESSING_NOTES: All the notes will be displayed in the Notes Tab. You can use the dropdown to switch between Notes and Journals.
HELP_TEXT.EDITING_NOTES_SUBTITLE: Click the edit button on the Note card to modify or delete the note.
HELP_TEXT.DISABLE_NOTES_MODIFICATIONS_SETTINGS: Turn on the settings to disable notes modifications. This will allow reading of the notes but will prevent it from being edited or deleted.
HELP_TEXT.VIEW_ACTIVE_SESSIONS: See where your account is currently logged in. You can login to your account from maximum 6 devices.
HELP_TEXT.TERMINATE_UNWANTED_SESSION: You can terminate unwanted sessions from here. This can help you secure your account if you notice any suspicious login.
HELP_TEXT.GET_ACTIVE_SESSION_INSIGHTS: Track the validity of all your active sessions. Each login session will automatically expire after 30 days.
HELP_TEXT.LOCATION_PRECISE_SUBTITLE: This widget shows the precise location of devices at the time of login. Please note that these locations may not be completely accurate.
HELP_TEXT.PASS_KEY_TITLE: Regenerate new Passkey for your account
HELP_TEXT.PASS_KEY_SUBTITLE: You need this Passkey to reset your account password. If you generate new Passkey, all your old Passkeys will become invalid and only the latest Passkey will work. Please keep this file at secure location for the security of your account.

TOOLTIPS.SESSION_VALIDITY: A session has a validity of 30 Days.
TOOLTIPS.PRECISE_LOCATION: Location can be precise and not accurate.
TOOLTIPS.ACTIVE_INVESTMENTS_INFO: Shows the amount currently invested across active FDs, RDs, Gold Assets and Stocks. These values represent invested capital and may differ from realized returns or profits.
TOOLTIPS.ASSET_ALLOCATION_INFO: Shows how your active investment portfolio is distributed across different asset classes. Use this to understand diversification and concentration of your investments.
TOOLTIPS.RETURNS_AND_ROI_INFO: Shows realized returns from completed investments. FD and RD returns include only investments closed after maturity, while Gold and Stock returns are based on sold holdings.
TOOLTIPS.UPCOMING_MATURITIES_INFO: Displays the next upcoming FD and RD maturities along with their expected maturity amounts. Matured entries are highlighted for quick identification.
TOOLTIPS.HOLDINGS_SUMMARY_INFO: Provides a quick summary of your active Gold and Stock holdings, including total assets, weight and units currently owned.
TOOLTIPS.TOP_HOLDINGS_INFO: Highlights your largest active Gold Asset and Stock Holding based on invested value. Use this to identify where the majority of your investment exposure is concentrated.
TOOLTIPS.ACCOUNT_SNAPSHOT_INFO: Provides a high-level overview of your account including current balance, total income, total expenses and overall spending percentage.
TOOLTIPS.CATEGORYWISE_DISTRIBUTION_INFO: Shows how your expenses are distributed across different categories. Use this to identify which categories consume the largest share of your spending.
TOOLTIPS.TOP_EXPENSES_INFO: Displays your highest-value expenses. Reviewing these transactions can help identify major spending patterns and opportunities to reduce unnecessary expenses.
TOOLTIPS.BUDGET_VS_ACTUAL_INFO: Compares your planned budget with actual spending across categories. This helps track whether your spending is aligned with your financial goals.
TOOLTIPS.BUDGET_HEALTH_INFO: Provides a summary of budget performance by showing how many categories are healthy, nearing their limits or exceeding their allocated budget.
TOOLTIPS.SPENDING_TIMELINE_INFO: Visualizes spending trends over time. Use this widget to identify spending spikes, recurring patterns and periods of increased financial activity.
TOOLTIPS.INCOME_OVERVIEW_INFO: Summarizes income performance including income received, expenses incurred, remaining funds and savings rate for the selected tracker.
TOOLTIPS.TOP_SPENDING_DAYS_INFO: Highlights the days with the highest spending activity. This can help identify spending habits, special events or recurring high-expense periods.
TOOLTIPS.WEEKEND_VS_WEEKDAY_INFO: Compares spending behaviour on weekdays and weekends, helping you understand when most of your discretionary spending occurs.
TOOLTIPS.INSIGHTS_INFO: Provides personalized observations and highlights based on your expense data, spending patterns, category trends and budget performance.
TOOLTIPS.SESSION_LOCATION_INFO: Location of devices that are currently logged in.
TOOLTIPS.QUICK_SAVE_EXPENSE: These expenses are not saved to any of your account. You need to import them later in Expense Manager.

ALERTS.HEALTHY_BUDGETS: {healthy} of {total} budget categories remained within limits
ALERTS.TOP_CATEGORY_NO_BUDGET: {category} is your highest spending category but has no budget
